Off Calendar Apr-28-2003 Continued To Jun-02-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Chad DeVeaux, Esq. and Patrick M. Ryan, Esq. of THELEN REID 369-7356, for defendants Ina Brasfield and Robert Mays, moving for a special motion to strike Plaintiff'S Complaint Pursuant To Sec. 425.16 Ccp
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. of BORNSTEIN & BORNSTEIN 409-7611, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
Upon request by both counsel, the Court continued hearing on DEFENDANTS INA BRASFIELD and Robert May's Special Motion To Strike Plaintiff'S Complaint Pursuant To Sec. 425.16 Ccp to June 2, 2003. Opposition due on 5/14 and reply on 5/21. Each Counsel is to provide courtesy copies to other side and to the Court. No written order required.(DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Pro Term Judge. James Green, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Margaret Del Coto. Daniel Bornstein, Esq. represented Santa Fe Associatges, Inc. Also present, Tobias Rivers, Manager of Santa Fe Associates, Inc. Chad Deveaux, Esq. and Jonathan E. Swartz, Esq. represented Defendant, Ina Brasfield. The Case did not settle and the trial date is confirmed.
